title: ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides psychiatric rehabilitation services for transition-age youth and adults with serious mental illness. Services include illness management, recovery groups and classes, dual diagnosis (mental illness and substance abuse) treatment, and vocational and education services. 627 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older, diagnosed with serious mental illness Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-9pm, Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-8pm (503) 434-7523 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7523 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Related Support Groups Vocational Rehabilitation * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
